reapack.name: reaper_reabeat
reapack.desc: ReaBeat: Neural beat detection and tempo mapping

metadata.description: {\rtf1\ansi\deff0{\fonttbl{\f0 Calibri;}} \f0\fs28 ReaBeat - Neural Beat Detection for REAPER\line \fs22\line State-of-the-art beat detection powered by beat-this (CPJKU, ISMIR 2024).\line \line \b Features:\b0\line \bullet Neural beat + downbeat detection (best published F1 scores)\line \bullet Three action modes: Match Tempo, Tempo Map, Stretch Markers\line \bullet Interactive waveform editor with beat/marker editing\line \bullet Quantize Strength slider (0-100%) - industry standard\line \bullet Multi-track sync with one click\line \bullet Per-item detection cache\line \line \b Requirements:\b0\line \bullet REAPER 6.0+\line \bullet Internet connection for first-time model download (~79MB)\line \line \b Note:\b0 On first detection, ReaBeat downloads the neural network model to ~/.reabeat/models/. This happens once.\line }

version.author: b451c
version.changelog:
ReaBeat 2.0 - Native C++ rewrite
- Native REAPER extension (no Python, no server, no installer) - Interactive waveform editor with beat/marker editing - Quantize Strength slider (0-100%) - Four quantize modes: Off, Straight, Bars, Project grid - Multi-track sync (tempo map + playrate + alignment + stretch markers) - Beat interpolation, consistency pass, onset refinement - Keyboard shortcuts: Space, Enter, N, Cmd+Z - Model auto-download on first use (~79MB)
